name: Jake Morrison
summary: I am a Computer Science graduate with experienced in AI/ML, cybersecurity and full-stack development. Completed master's thesis at Ericsson Research on AI-driven network optimization, with internships at Spotify (Backend), Google (AI) and CrowdStrike (Security). Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, cloud infrastructure and modern security tools. Passionate about building scalable, intelligent systems.

education.degree: MSc Computer Science - Specialization in AI & Security

bullets: Developed an AI-driven predictive maintenance framework for 5G base stations using Python, TensorFlow, and time-series analysis, reducing false alerts by 35\%.
Designed real-time data pipelines processing 10K+ telemetry readings per minute using Apache Kafka and PostgreSQL.
Collaborated with cross-functional engineering teams to integrate ML models into Ericsson's network monitoring dashboards.
Evaluated knowledge distillation techniques to compress inference models for edge deployment on resource-constrained hardware.
Built microservices in Java and Python handling 50K+ requests/sec for the podcast recommendation engine.
Implemented A/B testing infrastructure that improved playlist engagement metrics by 12\%.
Deployed services using Docker and Kubernetes on GCP with fully automated CI/CD pipelines.
Trained and fine-tuned NLP models for intent classification in Google Assistant, improving accuracy by 8\% on multilingual benchmarks.
Built data pipelines in Apache Beam processing 100M+ daily utterances for model training.
Presented findings to a team of 30+ engineers; two techniques adopted into production pipeline.
Developed automated malware classification rules using YARA and behavioral analysis on 5,000+ sandboxed samples.
Built a threat intelligence enrichment pipeline integrating VirusTotal, Shodan, and internal telemetry feeds.
Contributed to Falcon OverWatch threat hunting operations, identifying 3 previously unknown C2 infrastructure patterns.

projects.name: NeuralCompress - Model Compression Toolkit
bullets: Built a knowledge distillation pipeline achieving 4x model compression with only 2\% accuracy loss on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet subsets.
Implemented quantization-aware training and structured pruning strategies for edge deployment on Raspberry Pi and Jetson Nano.

projects.name: CloudCart - Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
projects.tech: React, Node.js, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, Stripe
bullets: Developed a production-grade e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management, Stripe payments, and JWT auth.
Containerized with Docker, orchestrated on Kubernetes with horizontal auto-scaling, health checks, and rolling deployments.

projects.name: ThreatHunter - Malware Analysis Suite
bullets: Created an automated malware detection system combining static YARA rules with dynamic behavioral analysis in sandboxed containers.
Built a SOC analyst dashboard with Elasticsearch, Logstash, and Kibana for real-time threat visualization and alerting.

projects.name: SmartTraffic - IoT Traffic Optimization
projects.tech: Python, TensorFlow Lite, Raspberry Pi, MQTT
bullets: Designed an ML-powered traffic signal optimization system reducing average intersection wait times by 28\%.
Deployed inference models on Raspberry Pi edge devices using TensorFlow Lite with real-time MQTT sensor data.

projects.name: SecureChat - End-to-End Encrypted Messenger
projects.tech: Go, React Native, WebSocket, Signal Protocol
bullets: Built a cross-platform encrypted messaging app implementing the Signal Protocol (Double Ratchet, X3DH key agreement).
Achieved sub-100ms message delivery latency using Go WebSocket servers with Redis pub/sub for horizontal scaling.

achievements: KTH Dean's List - Top 5\% of master's program (2025)
1st Place, HackStockholm 2025 - AI for Sustainability track (team of 4)
UC Berkeley Honors in Software Engineering - magna cum laude (2023)
Published paper on neural network compression at NeurIPS Workshop 2025
Google Summer of Code contributor - TensorFlow project (2022)
extracurricular: Open Source Contributor - 200+ merged PRs to scikit-learn, FastAPI, and Hugging Face Transformers
KTH AI Society - Vice President, organized 12 technical workshops with 500+ attendees
Mentor at Code for Sweden - taught Python and web development to 40+ career-changers
Competitive Programming - Codeforces rating 1750+ (Expert), 50+ LeetCode contests
